subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath manifested from His most exalted horizon the Sun of His Most Glorious Name, though it be less than the eye of a needle [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تجلی من افقه الاعلی بشمس اسمه الابهی اقل من سم الابره اذا
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @methods of teaching the Cause, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
